calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Set For Trial On Jan-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Verified Complaint
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alicia M. Gamez, of The Law Office of Alicia M. Gamez, Tel. 415.341.8143, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS AUDREY TOMASELLI AND GINA TOMASELLI'S Motion For Leave To Amend Verified Complaint is Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
